docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLUXOME STREET LOFTS, LLC DBA CITY LOFTS AS TO DEFENDANT DON MCDONALD AND SONS, INC. DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
